name: RefluxRatio
description: Column molar reflux ratio defined as RefluxRatio = Lreflux / (Ldist + Vovhd). For VLLE/VLWE systems it relates to liquid phase 1.

name: Tcond
description: Column condenser temperature

name: VFcond
description:
Column condenser vapor fraction
     VF<0: total condenser, subcooled
     VF=0: total condenser at bubble point
     0<VF<1: partial condenser. In the special case of a partial condenser at total reflux unspecify VFcond and specify Ldist=0 instead.

name: Pcond
description: Column condenser pressure

name: DPcond
description: Column condenser pressure drop representing the pressure drop in the condenser inlet piping

name: DPrflx
description: Column DP across the internal reflux valve

name: Ldist
description: Column molar distillate rate

name: Lmdist
description: Column mass distillate rate

name: Lreflux
description: Column molar reflux rate. For VLLE/VLWE systems it relates to liquid phase 1.

name: Lmreflux
description: Column mass reflux rate. For VLLE/VLWE systems it relates to liquid phase 1.

name: DutyCond
description: Column condenser duty

name: Hreflux
description: Column reflux molar enthalpy

name: zreflux[Methanol]
description: Column reflux molar composition

name: zreflux[Water]
description: Column reflux molar composition

name: LevelCond
description: Column internal condenser level fraction

name: ReboilRatio
description: Column molar reboil ratio defined as reboiler return rate / bottoms product rate

name: RoutFrac
description: Column reboiler molar draw rate fraction defined through BoilupRatio/VFboilup*Lbtms=RoutFrac*(Lbtms+Fboilup/VFboilup). RoutFrac is calculated for 'Internal' reboilers and specified for 'External' reboilers with a 'Single' sump.

name: BoilupRatio
description: Column molar boilup ratio defined as the vapor boilup rate / liquid product rate.

name: Preb
description: Column reboiler pressure

name: VFboilup
description: Column reboiler molar return unbounded vapor fraction. The VFboilup=1 applies to Kettle reboilers, typical values for thermosyphon reboilers are 0<VFboilup<0.4

name: Fboilup
description: Column boilup molar rate representing the combined vapor and liquid phases of the reboiler return.\nWhen Sump=None the reboiler represents a Kettle reboiler and Fboilup is 100% vapor phase.\nFor Sump=Single Fboilup represents a two-phase mixture depending on the value assigned to VFboilup.

name: Fmboilup
description: Column boilup mass rate representing the combined vapor and liquid phases of the reboiler return.\nWhen Sump=None the reboiler represents a Kettle reboiler and Fboilup is 100% vapor phase.\nFor Sump=Single Fboilup represents a two-phase mixture depending on the value assigned to VFboilup.

name: DutyReb
description: Column reboiler duty

name: Hboilup
description: Column boilup molar enthalpy

name: zboilup[Methanol]
description: Column boilup molar composition

name: zboilup[Water]
description: Column boilup molar composition

name: Treb
description: Column reboiler temperature

name: LevelReb
description: Column internal reboiler level fraction

name: VFreb
description: Column reboiler vapor fraction

name: DPreb
description: Column reboiler pressure drop representing the pressure drop in the reboiler return line
